title: NVDA isn’t leading the AI narrative right now (data perspective)
author: topicspace
selftext:
Everyone is still anchored on NVDA driving the AI trade.

But looking at the last few days of coverage:

* NVDA capacity narrative → breaking
* demand/supply story → flattening
* multiple NVDA-related narratives rolling over simultaneously

Meanwhile:

* CoreWeave + Broadcom infra stories are rising
* enterprise layer (Oracle, Adobe) quietly building

Feels like NVDA went from:  
\- narrative driver  
to  
\- narrative participant

Not bearish—just a shift in where attention is forming.
